External works

External building work.

External work is often the bit that gets overlooked — but it's what turns a property into a finished one. Total landscaping packages, retaining walls, patios, driveways, disabled adaptations, timber cladding and rendering.

Home External Work
30+
Years of building experience across Derbyshire
All
Trades in-house — brickwork, joinery, plumbing & electrical
1
Single point of contact for the entire build
£0
No-obligation written quotes for every project
05 / External

The bit that finishes the build.

We do external works as part of our own builds and as standalone projects for clients with an existing house that needs a new driveway, a proper patio or a structural retaining wall. Landscaping, hard standing, garden walls, gates, render and cladding — all done by the same in-house team.

Disabled adaptations (ramps, level access, dropped kerbs) are a regular part of our external work. We're happy to coordinate with occupational therapists or council schemes where required.

What's included

  • Total landscaping packages
  • Structural retaining walls
  • Patios & garden walls
  • Driveways & hardstanding
  • Boundary walls & gates
  • Disabled adaptations
  • Timber cladding
  • Rendering & external finishes
Get a quote
How it works

From quote
to handover.

A clear, ordered way of working that keeps the project on programme and the client in the loop.

01 / Look

Site visit

We come and look at the area, measure up and talk through what you want.

02 / Quote

Written quote

Itemised pricing covering materials, labour and timeline.

03 / Build

Managed works

Groundworks, drainage, structure and finish — phased so the site is left tidy each day.

04 / Finish

Snag & sign-off

Walk-through, snags fixed, area cleaned and handed over.

External job in mind?

Driveway, patio, retaining wall, render — give us a call and we'll come and quote.

01773 828516 Get a quote

Belper-based building contractors with over 30 years of experience across Derbyshire. House extensions, new builds, loft conversions, refurbishments and groundworks — every project managed from start to finish.
